description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with long, flowing pale blonde hair and a pale complexion. The doll is dressed in a white open-front cardigan over a black-and-white striped shirt, paired with dark shorts and brown shoes. Its eyes are large and blue, giving it a slightly somber or melancholic appearance, and the mouth is small and neutral. The doll carries a black crossbody bag slung over its right shoulder, adding a modern urban touch. The limbs are slender and proportionate, with the arms extended outward and the legs straight. The overall design is reminiscent of contemporary anime or manga characters, with a minimalist yet expressive aesthetic.
description: A pale, long-haired doll in a striped shirt, white cardigan, dark shorts, and brown shoes, carrying a black crossbody bag. The doll has large blue eyes and a modern, anime-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's facial features, striped shirt, white cardigan, crossbody bag, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and flow of the hair, the profile of the face, and the bag strap crossing the torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the hair cascading down the back, the back of the cardigan, and the shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's volume and the doll's profile, with the bag less visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual modern style with a white open-front cardigan, black-and-white horizontal striped shirt, dark shorts, and brown shoes; complemented by a black crossbody bag. The look is reminiscent of contemporary Japanese street fashion with minimalist influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended outward horizontally, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso erect. The pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly downturned mouth, large blue eyes open and gazing forward, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight, pale blonde hair with layered ends, parted in the center and flowing down past the waist.
